sessionStart.bash: command -v fleet >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; workspace=$(fleet agent in-workspace 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; workspace=$(printf "%s" "$workspace" | tr -d "\r\n"); printf "%s" "$workspace" | grep -Eq "^[A-Za-z0-9_.-]+/[A-Za-z0-9_.-]+$" || exit 0; printf '{"additionalContext":"MANDATORY: You are an agent working in a fleet workspace (%s). Your first action MUST be to use the skill tool to activate the fleet-agent skill. Do not inspect files, run commands, plan, answer the user, or take any other action before activating it. After activation, follow every fleet-agent instruction for the entire session."}' "$workspace"
